findings.description: URL text altered: hyphens inserted into URL path segments that were unhyphenated in the PDF. This changes the literal URL string.
findings.evidence: PDF shows: 'https://www.deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/wastemanagement/superfund-section/dry-cleaning-solvent-cleanup-act-program/dscastakeholder-work-group-information'. HTML shows: 'https://www.deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/waste-management/superfund-section/dry-cleaning-solvent-cleanup-act-program/dsca-stakeholder-work-group-information'. Hyphens added in 'waste-management' and 'dsca-stakeholder'.

findings.description: A full URL appears as plain text in the HTML without being wrapped in an <a href> tag.
findings.evidence:
The URL 'https://www.deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/waste-management/superfund-section/dry-cleaning-solvent-cleanup-act-program/dsca-stakeholder-work-group-information' appears as plain text in a

element, not wrapped in an anchor link.
